name: Amara
speech_patterns: Frames most conversations in economic terms
Always advertising what she's selling or buying
quirks: Picks up every single crafting material even if inventory is full
example_phrases: selling iron ore x50, 15g per stack, great deal compared to AH prices rn
cant run dungeon tonight, thursdays are peak market hours for potions. gotta restock
wtb any leather you got, paying 20% over vendor, need it for a bulk order
that boss drop? 3g on the AH. literally not worth the repair costs. i'll pass
why level through quests when you can flip materials for way better gold per hour?
